# task-list

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Tree view of all tasks rendered in the Tasks pane. Defines Tasks.List/TaskActions slots and ships the row actions (delete, expand-all, launch-agent).
- Defines:
  - Slots: `Tasks.List`, `Tasks.TaskActions`
- Exports (web):
  - Values: `STATUS_META`, `StatusIcon`, `Tasks`, `TasksList`
- Contributes:
  - `Tasks.TaskActions` → `ExpandCollapseAllAction`
  - `Tasks.TaskActions` → `DeleteTaskAction`
  - `Tasks.TaskActions` → `LaunchAgentAction`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
